name: Almond-Poppy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
3. In a large bowl, blend flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder on low speed until all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Add butter, sour cream, and three eggs. Mix on medium speed until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Beat on high speed for 2 minutes, then scrape the bowl.
6. Add remaining three eggs one at a time, alternating with Amaretto or almond liqueur. Beat well after each addition.
7. Blend in poppy seeds on low speed.
8. Pour batter into prepared pans and bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then invert cakes onto racks to cool completely.
10. When the cake has cooled completely, lightly dust the top with confectioners' sugar.
